title: mariscus microstachyus
intro: Mariscus microstachyus, also known as the Dwarf Muhly, is a species of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mariscus microstachyus include soothing coughs and colds, reducing inflammation, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves and roots in hot water, and is often used in traditional medicine to aid in the relief of various health issues.
